title: Research summary for run-0001-perch-baseline
summary: [card:research-run-0001-perch-baseline-md-adopt-now-guidance] Ship raw-probe bundle first with no prior fusion and no calibration tweaks. The 0.665 local score is the honest baseline; a Kaggle score anchors every subsequent decision.; [card:01-validated-findings-md-validation-and-metric-semantics] Use holdout validation ROC-AUC as the primary local signal for iteration, not training soundscape metrics.; [card:01-validated-findings-md-perch-and-embedding-findings] Retain embedding-head style models as they can add complementary signal even when standalone scores are not best.

title: Research summary for run-0003-0001-class-coverage-expansion-probe
summary: [require @ 0.88] Use embedding-head style models as complementary signal — card:01-validated-findings-md-perch-and-embedding-findings; [prefer @ 0.68] Adopt MLP probe head from run-0002-0003 as baseline configuration; lane leader at 0.6801 — card:research-run-0002-0003-coverage-mlp-combined-full-75-class-mlp-probe-md-adopt-now; Package current best configuration (run-0003-0001, val ROC-AUC 0.6652) as submission bundle; verdict is submission-required; Calibrate Bayesian prior fusion weights — current prior fusion val metric (0.662) barely exceeds raw val (0.665), indicating miscalibrated temperature or weighting

title: Research summary for run-0002-0002-calibrated-prior-fusion-v2
summary: [card:research-run-0003-0002-prior-fusion-weight-calibration-md-adopt-now] Ship run-0003-0001 (leader at 0.6652) or run-0002-0001 raw-probe submission bundle. Use raw probe output exclusively — prior fusion degrades it (0.6622). The bundle is already validated and critic-approved.; [card:01-validated-findings-md-perch-and-embedding-findings] Embedding-head style models can add complementary signal even when their standalone score is not the best (require @ 0.88). Keep the perch embedding probe as the primary signal source.; [memory:memory-0002] Primary data_coverage branch is the leader at 0.665216 with critic=approved. This is the submission candidate to bundle first.
